title: The Merchant???
description: A suspiciously convenient merchant has set up shop. You can browse and purchase relics, or if things don't go well, throw a potion at them.
conditions: Requires 100+ Gold OR a Foul Potion in inventory
notes: This is a [blue]custom event[/blue] with no standard options. Instead, you interact with the merchant through a custom UI to browse and purchase relics. The merchant stocks 6 random relics from a pool of 9 possible relics: Fake Anchor, Fake Blood Vial, Fake Happy Flower, Fake Lee's Waffle, Fake Mango, Fake Orichalcum, Fake Snecko Eye, Fake Strike Dummy, and Fake Venerable Tea Set. Each relic costs [gold]50 Gold[/gold]. If you have a [red]Foul Potion[/red], you can throw it at the merchant to trigger a combat encounter ([gold]FakeMerchantEventEncounter[/gold]). After defeating the merchant, you receive [gold]Fake Merchant's Rug[/gold] plus any relics you didn't purchase.
